attacking_style: Limited attacking observed; tends toward reactive rather than proactive racing. When positioned well, struggles to capitalize with decisive moves in critical moments.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns from available observations.
terrain_preference: Showed strength on Stage 1 terrain but exposed on sustained final climbs where losses accumulated. Struggles to maintain form across multi-stage efforts.
vulnerability: Passive decision-making in chase dynamics; drops on final climbs despite earlier strength; inability to sustain form race-to-race leading to significant time losses.
key_patterns: Passive tactics in decisive moments: played cat-and-mouse instead of attacking hard (2 instances).
Form inconsistency: strong performances followed immediately by being dropped on climbs (2 instances).
Poor tactical calculation in chase groups, costing overall classification positions and time.
form_trajectory: negative: Both observations show deteriorating performance within same race, losing red jersey through passive tactics and unable to sustain initial strength
